compounds.frequency: 2x daily (100mg between 11am-2pm and 100mg prior to bed)

benefits.description: Feeling the best in terms of energy output in a long time on current dosing schedule
Improved physical appearance on current protocol
Improved mental clarity on current dosing schedule

side_effects.description: BAM15 taken in AM felt like it was negatively impacting cardio performance; resolved by shifting dose to later in day

protocol_notes: Started BAM15 end of May at 150mg/day (50mg 3x daily), titrated up to 300mg/day (100mg 3x daily), then changed to 200mg/day (100mg 2x daily). Changed dosing schedule away from AM due to cardio impact. Also on TRT and other peptides (unspecified). Blood panel taken before and after starting BAM15; results reportedly unchanged. Considering dropping BAM15 for a break.
